MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Steven McDonald, Esq. of Greenstein & McDonald, 415-642-7300 for defendant and moving party David Ngo, Phung Ngo.
Katrina Decker, Esq of Steven Adair Macdonald & Assoc., 415-956-6488 for plaintiff and opposing party Ann Ngo

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows
DEFENDANT DAVID NGO, PHUNG NGO'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT - GRANTED ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: PATTY LEE HUBBLE CSR# 3058 (301/JLW/DS)

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2005 Continued To Nov-04-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: J. Scott Weaver, Esq. of WEST BAY LAW 693-0504 for Plaintiffs in action 438381 and moving for consolidatiion of 613188 and 438381
Katrina C. Decker, Esq. of STEVEN ADAIR MacDONALD & ASSOCIATES, P.C. 956-6488 for Plaintiff ANN NGO in action 614299 and opposing the motion to strike Steven J. McDonald, Esq. of GREENSTEIN & McDONALD 642-7300 for defendants DAVID NGO in action 614299 and moving to strike Second Amended Complaint as a meritless SLAPP
Argued and the Court granted the motion to consolidate 438381 and 613188. Action 438381 is designated the lead case.
The motion to strike the Second Amended Complaint was argued and continued to November 4, 2005 for further argument. Supplemental briefing no later than November 2nd. (301/JLW/ds) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-22-2005 Continued To Oct-24-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven J. McDonald, Esq. of GREENSTEIN & MCDONALD 642-7300, appearing for defendants/moving parties David Ngo and Phung Ngo
James A. Browne, Esq. of STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD & ASSOCIATES 956-6488, appearing for plaintiff/opposing party Ann Ngo

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court ordered as follows: Court will issue an Order to Show Cause why 438381 and 613188 should not be consolidated for all purposes. Parties were also ordered to brief the question whether case 613299 should be consolidated as well. Hearing set on October 24, 2005 in Dept. 301. Briefing schedule modified after the hearing: simultaneous moving briefs to be filed on 10/10 and simultaneous oppositions on 10/19. DEFENDANTS DAVID NGO and PHUNG NGO'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to October 24, 2005 at 9:30 a.m. (301/JLW/DS) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.

DEFENDANT DAVID NGO, PHUNG NGO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW/AC)
